name: Act on the Protection of Specially Designated Secrets
description: Act No. 108 of 2013, effective December 2014. Organizes national-security secrets into 4 categories (Defense, Diplomacy, Prevention of Specified Harmful Activities, Prevention of Terrorism), governs designation, handler security-clearance vetting, and penalties.
relationToCloudSecurity: See registry/regulation/cas.go.jp.json in the SecID repo (CloudSecurityAlliance/SecID) for cloud/AI security relevance notes on this source.
relationToAISecurity: See the paired SecID registry entry.

license.notes: Primary legislation -- excluded from copyright under Japan's Copyright Act Article 13, same basis as APPI and the My Number Act.

current_extraction.notes: Only the Cabinet Secretariat's English overview (5-page slide-style summary) was acquired, not the full statutory text (japaneselawtranslation.go.jp blocked, HTTP 403, confirmed persistent).

scope.notes: Overview only. Full article text blocked at the only known source.
